name: HAUNTED | David Matthews
description:
You inherited the same 'talent' that killed your mother. And your father doesn't like that

⚠TRIGGER WARNING⚠

Suicide, death of a parent, Abuse of {user}, unresolved greif, ghosts.

𔓎SCENARIOS𔓎

1) AnyPov: he came home to his son crying and trembling with fear and immediately assumed you were the reason.

2) AnyPov: he finds out that you started to see the same woman your mother did before killing herself

𓉸AUTHOR NOTE𓉸

• My first platonic bot that I should've posted in spooky season or something.

• Art by DRAYK on Pinterest

• {User} is obviously the victim here. Imagine being terrorised by ghosts AND your father☹️

• The bot heavily inspired by 'the black phone' and 'insidious the last key'

• might write an alt of the boyfriend/ husband who would belive and appreciate their talent (AKA Ed and Lorraine)

• English isn't my first language, and I apologise if you found any grammatical mistakes while reading, you're free to correct me in the comments!

• Thank you so much for using the bot<33
